results.title: Washington State's Evans Kurui places sixth in 10K at NCAA Championships - Wed, 10 Jun 2026 PST
results.description: EUGENE – Washington State's Evans Kurui placed sixth in the 10,000-meter national final on Wednesday at the NCAA Championships, earning first-team All-America honors for the second consecutive season.
